title: Kaizen Savings Tracker
description: Industrial-grade tool for calculating cost savings from Kaizen (continuous improvement) events, aligned with Lean, Six Sigma, and ISO 9001 standards. Tracks direct savings, productivity gains, quality improvements, and hidden loss drivers.

inputs.label: Labor Rate (per hour)
inputs.businessContext: Average fully loaded labor cost per operator hour, including wages, benefits, and overhead. Based on industry benchmarks (BLS, ISO 9001:2015 clause 7.1.6).

label_i18n.es: Tarifa de mano de obra (por hora)

businessContext_i18n.en: Average fully loaded labor cost per operator hour, including wages, benefits, and overhead. Based on industry benchmarks (BLS, ISO 9001:2015 clause 7.1.6).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yan haklar ve genel giderler dahil, operatör başına saatlik ortalama tam yüklü işçilik maliyeti. Sektör kıyaslamalarına dayanır (BLS, ISO 9001:2015 madde 7.1.6).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche voll belastete Arbeitskosten pro Bedienerstunde, einschließlich Löhne, Sozialleistungen und Gemeinkosten. Basierend auf Branchenbenchmarks (BLS, ISO 9001:2015 Klausel 7.1.6).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen chargé de la main-d'œuvre par heure d'opérateur, incluant salaires, avantages et frais généraux. Basé sur des références sectorielles (BLS, ISO 9001:2015 clause 7.1.6).
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo laboral total promedio por hora operador, incluyendo salarios, beneficios y gastos generales. Basado en referencias industriales (BLS, ISO 9001:2015 cláusula 7.1.6).

inputs.label: Number of Operators Affected
inputs.businessContext: Number of direct operators whose work is impacted by the Kaizen event. Used to calculate labor savings.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of direct operators whose work is impacted by the Kaizen event. Used to calculate labor savings.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaizen etkinliğinden etkilenen doğrudan operatör sayısı. İşçilik tasarrufunu hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der direkten Bediener, deren Arbeit durch das Kaizen-Ereignis beeinflusst wird. Wird zur Berechnung der Arbeitseinsparungen verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'opérateurs directs dont le travail est impacté par l'événement Kaizen. Utilisé pour calculer les économies de main-d'œuvre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de operadores directos cuyo trabajo se ve impactado por el evento Kaizen. Se utiliza para calcular ahorros de mano de obra.

inputs.label: Time Saved per Operator per Shift
inputs.businessContext: Reduction in cycle time or non-value-added time per operator per shift, measured via time studies (Lean standard work, ISO 22400).

label_i18n.en: Time Saved per Operator per Shift
label_i18n.tr: Operatör Başına Vardiya Başına Kazanılan Süre
label_i18n.fr: Temps gagné par opérateur par quart de travail
label_i18n.es: Tiempo ahorrado por operador por turno

businessContext_i18n.en: Reduction in cycle time or non-value-added time per operator per shift, measured via time studies (Lean standard work, ISO 22400).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zaman etütleri ile ölçülen, operatör başına vardiya başına çevrim süresi veya katma değersiz süredeki azalma (Yalın standart iş, ISO 22400).
businessContext_i18n.de: Reduzierung der Zykluszeit oder der nicht wertschöpfenden Zeit pro Bediener pro Schicht, gemessen durch Zeitstudien (Lean Standardarbeit, ISO 22400).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Réduction du temps de cycle ou du temps sans valeur ajoutée par opérateur par quart, mesurée via des études de temps (travail standard Lean, ISO 22400).
businessContext_i18n.es: Reducción del tiempo de ciclo o tiempo sin valor agregado por operador por turno, medida mediante estudios de tiempos (trabajo estándar Lean, ISO 22400).

inputs.label: Shifts per Day
inputs.businessContext: Number of production shifts per day. Typical in manufacturing (WERC DC Measures).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of production shifts per day. Typical in manufacturing (WERC DC Measures).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Günlük üretim vardiyası sayısı. Üretimde tipiktir (WERC DC Ölçütleri).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Produktionsschichten pro Tag. Üblich in der Fertigung (WERC DC Measures).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de quarts de production par jour. Typique dans la fabrication (WERC DC Measures).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de turnos de producción por día. Típico en manufactura (WERC DC Measures).

inputs.label: Operating Days per Year
inputs.businessContext: Annual operating days, excluding weekends and holidays. Standard for industrial planning (ISO 9001).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual operating days, excluding weekends and holidays. Standard for industrial planning (ISO 9001).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık çalışma günü, hafta sonları ve tatiller hariç. Endüstriyel planlama için standart (ISO 9001).
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Betriebstage, ohne Wochenenden und Feiertage. Standard für die industrielle Planung (ISO 9001).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Jours ouvrables annuels, hors week-ends et jours fériés. Standard pour la planification industrielle (ISO 9001).
businessContext_i18n.es: Días operativos anuales, excluyendo fines de semana y festivos. Estándar para planificación industrial (ISO 9001).

inputs.label: Defect Rate Before Kaizen
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of defective units before improvement. Six Sigma DMAIC baseline (DPMO conversion).

label_i18n.es: Tasa de defectos antes del Kaizen

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of defective units before improvement. Six Sigma DMAIC baseline (DPMO conversion).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İyileştirme öncesi hatalı birim yüzdesi. Altı Sigma DMAIC temel çizgisi (DPMO dönüşümü).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der fehlerhaften Einheiten vor der Verbesserung. Six Sigma DMAIC-Ausgangsbasis (DPMO-Umrechnung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'unités défectueuses avant amélioration. Référence Six Sigma DMAIC (conversion DPMO).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de unidades defectuosas antes de la mejora. Línea base DMAIC de Seis Sigma (conversión DPMO).

inputs.label: Defect Rate After Kaizen
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of defective units after improvement. Must be <= defect_rate_before for valid savings.

label_i18n.es: Tasa de defectos después de Kaizen

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of defective units after improvement. Must be <= defect_rate_before for valid savings.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İyileştirme sonrası hatalı birim yüzdesi. Geçerli tasarruf için hata_oranı_oncesi'nden küçük veya eşit olmalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der fehlerhaften Einheiten nach der Verbesserung. Muss <= Ausschussrate vorher sein, um gültige Einsparungen zu erzielen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'unités défectueuses après amélioration. Doit être <= taux_defauts_avant pour des économies valides.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de unidades defectuosas después de la mejora. Debe ser <= tasa_de_defectos_anterior para ahorros válidos.

inputs.label: Annual Production Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total units produced per year. Used to scale defect savings.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total units produced per year. Used to scale defect savings.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık üretilen toplam birim. Hata tasarruflarını ölçeklendirmek için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtproduktion pro Jahr. Wird verwendet, um Ausschusseinsparungen zu skalieren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'unités produites par an. Utilisé pour dimensionner les économies sur les défauts.
businessContext_i18n.es: Unidades totales producidas por año. Se utiliza para escalar los ahorros por defectos.

rules.message: Defect rate after Kaizen must be less than or equal to defect rate before.
Time saved per operator must be non-negative.
Annual production volume must be greater than zero.

thresholds.message: Total annual savings are below $10,000. Consider re-evaluating the Kaizen scope.
ROI is negative. The implementation cost exceeds first-year savings.
More than 50% of savings come from defect reduction. Verify defect rate data accuracy.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
